name: NetWatch
description: Companion plugin for the NetWatch network monitoring app. Adds a diagnostic skill that reads incident bundles, correlates device connector data (Firewalla, Orbi, Nighthawk), and delivers plain-English root-cause analysis with ISP escalation drafts.
author: Louis Swingrover

skills.name: netwatch-diagnose
skills.description: Diagnose network incidents from NetWatch data. Checks if NetWatch is installed, reads the most recent incident bundle, correlates Firewalla/Orbi/Nighthawk connector snapshots, runs root-cause chain analysis (WAN outage vs router issue vs DNS failure vs local blip), and delivers recommended actions + a pre-filled ISP escalation draft. Trigger: 'diagnose my network', 'what happened to my internet', 'run NetWatch diagnose', 'why did my connection drop'.
